title: RFP KB Canonical Entry v2
description: Clean schema for new KB entries produced by kb_extract_historical.py. v1 entries (Planning/WMS/AIML) use canonical_question/canonical_answer and are untouched. Phase 3 will unify field names in llm_router.py.

id.description: Unique entry ID. Format: {PREFIX}-{CAT}-{NNNN}, e.g. NET-FUNC-0042

question.description: The canonical question, rewritten to be generic (client-specific details removed).

answer.description: Blue Yonder's answer describing product capabilities. Never empty.

question_variants.description: Alternative phrasings of the question. Improves RAG recall.

solution_codes.description: Which solution codes this applies to. Empty = applies to all solutions in the family.

subcategory.description: Specific topic within the category, snake_case.

tags.description: Keyword tags for search boosting and filtering.

source_rfps.description: Archive IDs of source RFPs that contributed this answer.

cloud_native_only.description: True if this answer applies to SaaS/cloud-native deployment only.

notes.description: Internal notes. Not used in RAG retrieval.

example.question: Does the platform provide real-time visibility of shipment status across carriers?
example.answer: Blue Yonder Command Center provides end-to-end visibility across all transport modes with real-time tracking via carrier integrations, EDI, and IoT sensors.
question_variants: How do you track shipments in real-time?
What shipment visibility capabilities does BY offer?
